description: WARZONE 5: World Simulation Engine - Time, Diplomacy, and Dynamic Events

techContext.typecheckCommand: mypy --strict src/contexts/world && npm --prefix frontend run type-check
techContext.conventions: Hexagonal Architecture. Domain Events. Result pattern. shadcn/ui + Tailwind only.

userStories.title: Domain - WorldCalendar Value Object
userStories.description: Create WorldCalendar value object with year, month, day, era_name fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Fields: year (int), month (int), day (int), era_name (str), days_per_month (int=30), months_per_year (int=12)
Method: advance(days: int) -> WorldCalendar (returns new instance)
Method: format() -> str (e.g., 'Year 1042, Month 3, Day 15 - Third Age')
Test cases: advance within month, month rollover, year rollover, format output

userStories.title: Domain - Calendar Integration
userStories.description: Integrate WorldCalendar into WorldState aggregate, replacing raw datetime.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace world_time: datetime field with calendar: WorldCalendar
Update advance_time() method to use calendar.advance()
Add class method: from_datetime_world_time(dt: datetime) for migration

userStories.title: API - Calendar Router
userStories.description: Create API endpoints for calendar operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Router prefix: /calendar (NO /api prefix in decorator - it's added by include_router)
- CalendarResponse: year, month, day, era_name, formatted_date

userStories.title: Frontend - Calendar Display Component
userStories.description: Create React component to display and control calendar.
acceptanceCriteria: Props: worldId: string, onAdvance?: (days: number) => void
Use shadcn/ui Card component for container
Display: formatted date (large text), era name (subtitle), Advance buttons (1 day, 7 days, 30 days)
Use TanStack Query for data fetching
Handle loading, error, and success states
Verify: renders correctly with mock data

userStories.title: Domain - Enhance HistoryEvent
userStories.description: Add new fields to HistoryEvent entity for simulation support.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ImpactScope enum: LOCAL, REGIONAL, GLOBAL
Add EventType enum: WAR, TRADE, DISCOVERY, POLITICAL, NATURAL, DEATH, BIRTH, MARRIAGE

userStories.title: API - Events Router
userStories.description: Create API endpoints for historical events CRUD.
acceptanceCriteria: GET / -> list events (paginated, filter by type, scope, date range)
- EventFilterParams (event_type, impact_scope, from_date, to_date, page, page_size)

userStories.title: Frontend - Timeline Component
userStories.description: Create timeline component to display historical events.
acceptanceCriteria: Follow existing MemoryTimeline.tsx pattern for styling
Vertical timeline with date grouping (use WorldCalendar.format())
Each event shows: title, date, type badge, impact scope badge, description
Filter controls: event_type dropdown, impact_scope dropdown
Use shadcn/ui Card, Badge, Select components
E2E test: verify timeline renders with mock events

userStories.title: Domain - DiplomaticStatus Enum
userStories.description: Create enum for diplomatic relationship statuses with strength mapping.
acceptanceCriteria: Property: color -> str (for UI: green, yellow, red, etc.)

userStories.title: Domain - DiplomacyMatrix Aggregate
userStories.description: Create aggregate to manage all faction diplomatic relations.
acceptanceCriteria: Wraps existing FactionRelation system from Faction entity
Fields: world_id: str, relations: dict[tuple[str, str], DiplomaticStatus]
- set_status(faction_a: str, faction_b: str, status: DiplomaticStatus) -> None
- to_matrix() -> dict[str, dict[str, str]] (for API response)
Invariant validation: set_status raises ValueError if creates conflict
(e.g., A declares ALLIED but B has AT_WAR)

userStories.title: API - Diplomacy Router
userStories.description: Create API endpoints for diplomacy operations.

userStories.title: Frontend - Diplomacy Matrix Grid
userStories.description: Create visual grid showing faction relationships.
acceptanceCriteria: Data grid: rows = factions, columns = factions, cells = relationship color
Color mapping using DiplomaticStatus.color from API
Click cell opens shadcn/ui Dialog to edit relation
Dialog contains: faction names, current status, status dropdown, save/cancel buttons
Use shadcn/ui Table (or custom grid), Dialog, Select components
E2E test: verify grid renders, click cell opens dialog

userStories.title: Domain - FactionIntent Entity
userStories.description: Create entity representing a faction's intended action.
acceptanceCriteria: Create IntentType enum: EXPAND, ATTACK, DEFEND, ALLY, TRADE, RECOVER, CONSOLIDATE
- target_id: str | None (faction_id or location_id depending on type)

userStories.title: Application - FactionIntentGenerator
userStories.description: Create service to generate faction intents based on world state (rule-based).
acceptanceCriteria: Method: generate_intents(faction: Faction, world: WorldState, diplomacy: DiplomacyMatrix) -> list[FactionIntent]
2. If has_enemies and enemy.military < faction.military * 0.5: ATTACK intent (priority 7)
3. If has_no_allies and wealth > 40: ALLY intent with strongest neutral faction (priority 6)
4. If territories < 3 and wealth > 50: EXPAND intent (priority 5)
5. If military > 80 and has_enemies: DEFEND border intent (priority 4)
Return max 3 intents per faction, sorted by priority
Create tests with mock Faction and WorldState

userStories.title: Domain - SimulationTick Value Object
userStories.description: Create value object to record simulation step results.
acceptanceCriteria: Create ResourceChanges dataclass: wealth_delta, military_delta, influence_delta
Create DiplomacyChange dataclass: faction_a, faction_b, status_before, status_after

userStories.title: Application - Basic Simulation Tick
userStories.description: Create basic simulation service that advances calendar and generates faction intents.
acceptanceCriteria: Method: advance_simulation(world_id: str, days: int = 1) -> Result[SimulationTick, SimulationError]
4. For each faction: generate intents using FactionIntentGenerator
5. Create SimulationTick with results (no changes applied yet)
6. Return tick (this version is read-only, for preview)
Create SimulationError enum in src/core/errors.py if needed
Dependency injection: takes repositories in constructor

userStories.title: Application - Intent Resolution
userStories.description: Add intent resolution logic to simulation service.
acceptanceCriteria: Add method: _resolve_intents(intents: list[FactionIntent], world: WorldState) -> ResolutionResult
- ATTACK: Reduces attacker and defender military (-5 each), may change territory ownership
- EXPAND: Requires wealth >= 20, reduces wealth by 10, adds territory if available
- ALLY: Creates bilateral ALLIED status if target accepts (target has no conflicts)
- RECOVER: Increases wealth by +5 if below 50
- DEFEND: Increases military by +3 if below 80
Handle conflicts: two factions attacking same target
Create ResolutionResult dataclass with changes to apply

userStories.title: Application - Full Simulation Integration
userStories.description: Complete simulation service with snapshots, events, and side effects.
acceptanceCriteria: Add commit_simulation(world_id: str, days: int = 1) -> Result[SimulationTick, SimulationError]
6. Run SanityChecker (log warnings but don't block)
Add simulation history tracking (in-memory for now)

userStories.title: API - Simulation Router
userStories.description: Create API endpoints for simulation operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Consider using BackgroundTasks for long simulations (>30 days)

userStories.title: Domain - Character Birth Date
userStories.description: Add birth date field to Character entity for age tracking.
acceptanceCriteria: Add field: birth_date: WorldCalendar | None = None
Add method: get_age(current_calendar: WorldCalendar) -> int | None
- Returns None if birth_date is None
- Returns age in years (simplified: year difference)
Add field: death_date: WorldCalendar | None = None
All new fields nullable for backward compatibility

userStories.title: Domain - Character Location Tracking
userStories.description: Add location tracking to Character entity.
acceptanceCriteria: Add field: current_location_id: str | None = None
Add method: move_to(location_id: str) -> Character (returns new instance)
Event fields: character_id, location_id_before, location_id_after, timestamp
Create TravelRecord dataclass: location_id, arrived_date, departed_date | None

userStories.title: Domain - CharacterReaction Value Object
userStories.description: Create value object for character reactions to events.
acceptanceCriteria: Create ReactionType enum: OBSERVE, FLEE, INVESTIGATE, IGNORE, CELEBRATE, MOURN, PROTEST

userStories.title: Application - Character Reactor
userStories.description: Create service for character reactions to world events.
acceptanceCriteria: Method: react_to_event(character: Character, event: HistoryEvent, world: WorldState) -> CharacterReaction
- If character.faction_id in event.affected_faction_ids: higher intensity
- If event.impact_scope == GLOBAL: all characters react
- If event.event_type == WAR and character.pacifist: PROTEST
- If event.event_type == DEATH and character knows deceased: MOURN
- If event.event_type == TRADE and character is merchant: CELEBRATE
Integration with CharacterMemoryService to create memory entry
Create tests with various event types

userStories.title: Frontend - Character Location Display
userStories.description: Update LocationTree to show characters at each location.
acceptanceCriteria: For each location node, show character avatars as children
Use shadcn/ui Avatar component with character initials or image
Avatar shows: name tooltip on hover, status indicator (alive/deceased)
Click avatar opens CharacterDetailDialog (existing or create minimal)
Add filter toggle: show/hide characters in tree
Handle: characters without location (show in 'Unknown' category)
E2E test: verify characters appear under correct locations

userStories.title: Domain - Rumor Entity
userStories.description: Create entity for rumors that spread through the world.
acceptanceCriteria: Create RumorOrigin enum: EVENT, NPC, PLAYER, UNKNOWN
Method: spread_to(location_id: str) -> Rumor (returns new instance with decreased truth)
Method: truth_after_spread() -> int (truth_value - 10 per hop, min 0)

userStories.title: Application - Rumor Propagation
userStories.description: Create service to propagate rumors through locations.
acceptanceCriteria: - For each rumor, find adjacent locations to current_locations
- Spread to adjacent locations (decrease truth by 10)
Method: create_rumor_from_event(event: HistoryEvent, world: WorldState) -> Rumor
- Generate rumor content based on event (rule-based template)
- Initial truth_value based on event impact_scope
- Start at event location or random faction territory
Track rumor statistics: total_rumors, avg_truth, most_spread

userStories.title: Frontend - Rumor Board
userStories.description: Create component to display rumors at a location.
acceptanceCriteria: Props: worldId: string, locationId?: string (optional filter)
Color mapping: green (80+), yellow (40-79), orange (20-39), red (0-19)
Sort options: by truth_value, by spread_count, by created_date
E2E test: verify rumors display with correct colors

userStories.title: Application - Sanity Checker
userStories.description: Create service to validate world state consistency.
acceptanceCriteria: Create SanityViolation dataclass: rule_name, severity, message, affected_ids
1. dead_character_has_location: ERROR if deceased character has current_location_id
2. faction_no_influence_has_territories: WARNING if faction.influence == 0 and has territories
3. circular_location_hierarchy: ERROR if location parent chain has cycles
4. orphaned_entities: WARNING if entity references non-existent parent
5. duplicate_faction_relations: ERROR if faction has duplicate relation entries
Method: check_and_raise(world) -> None (raises on ERROR severity)
Create tests with various violation scenarios

userStories.title: Domain - WorldSnapshot Entity
userStories.description: Create entity for world state snapshots.

userStories.title: Application - Snapshot Service
userStories.description: Create service to manage world state snapshots.
acceptanceCriteria: Create SnapshotError enum: NOT_FOUND, RESTORE_FAILED, STORAGE_ERROR
Storage: in-memory dict for now (add repository later)

userStories.title: API - Snapshot Router
userStories.description: Create API endpoints for snapshot operations.
acceptanceCriteria: - SnapshotResponse: snapshot_id, calendar, tick_number, description, created_at, size_bytes

userStories.title: Frontend - Simulation Dashboard
userStories.description: Create main simulation dashboard page with all controls.
acceptanceCriteria: Layout: 3-column grid (left: controls, center: events, right: factions)
- SimulateButton: Preview (1/7/30 days) and Commit buttons
E2E test: full simulation flow (advance time, verify events, rollback)
